title: HackerNews, ProductHunt, LinkedIn, Discord Go/No-Go Evaluation
description: Single evaluation document with 1-page go/no-go assessment per platform for HN, ProductHunt, LinkedIn, and Discord.

scope.in: For each platform: audience fit, effort required, expected ROI, timing recommendation, go/no-go verdict with trigger conditions.
scope.out: No full strategies for any platform. No execution plans.

dod.criterion: Single document covers all 4 platforms (HN, ProductHunt, LinkedIn, Discord) with ~1 page each
Each platform assessment includes audience fit, effort estimate, ROI expectation, and clear go/no-go verdict
Trigger conditions specify when to pursue each platform

tasks.title: Write 4-platform go/no-go evaluation document
tasks.user_scenario: CEO reads a concise document and knows which secondary platforms to pursue, when, and under what conditions.
tasks.scope: Produce platform-evaluation.md covering HN, ProductHunt, LinkedIn, Discord. For each: audience fit, effort estimate (hours/week), ROI (low/medium/high), timing recommendation, trigger conditions, GO/NO-GO/CONDITIONAL verdict. End with summary comparison table. Under 2000 words.

dod.criterion: Document covers all 4 platforms (HackerNews, ProductHunt, LinkedIn, Discord)
Each platform section includes: audience fit analysis, effort estimate, ROI assessment, timing recommendation, and bold GO/NO-GO/CONDITIONAL verdict
Each platform section includes at least one specific trigger condition for revisiting the verdict
Document ends with summary comparison table showing platform, verdict, effort, ROI, and recommended timing
Total document length is under 2000 words
